ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spectroscopy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectroscopy measurement */,
  "pixel" INTEGER /* Pixel number of the measurement */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Wavelength of the light used for measurement */,
  "bg" INTEGER /* Background value at the respective pixel */,
  "gray" REAL /* Gray value of the measurement */,
  "gray_white" REAL /* Ratio of gray to white value */,
  "white" REAL /* White value of the measurement */,
  "leaf" REAL /* Leaf value of the measurement */,
  "white_bg" REAL /* White background value */,
  "leaf_bg" REAL /* Leaf background value */,
  "leaf_bg_white_bg_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of leaf background to white background */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant associated with the measurement */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  "instrument_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument used for the measurement */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who conducted the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectroscopy_data_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectroscopy_data_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "species" TEXT /* Scientific name of the plant species */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety or cultivar of the plant */,
  "growth_stage" TEXT /* Growth stage of the plant (e.g., seedling, mature) */,
  "cultivation_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the plant was cultivated (e.g., hydroponic, soil-based) */,
  "genetic_information" TEXT /* Genetic information about the plant */,
  "date_of_sowing" TEXT /* Date when the plant was sown */,
  "date_of_harvest" TEXT /* Date when the plant was harvested */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the plant's growth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project under which the experiment is conducted */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Main objective of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, assistant) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., Manual Spectroscopy, Automated Imaging) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument used for data collection */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration of the instrument */,
  "calibration_certificate" TEXT /* Calibration certificate for the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated experiment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the data file is stored */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for verifying data integrity */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed data file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the file */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the user is affiliated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role in JSON format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated data entry */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., 'experiment_id', 'species') */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value associated with the metadata key */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., spectroscopy, phenotype) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata (e.g., manual entry, automated system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES spectroscopy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated experiment */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted (e.g., correlation, regression) */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the analysis result */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis result */,
  "result_visualization" TEXT /* Link or reference to visualizations of the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
